languages.text: "Отнюдь". {n}Блюститель сразу находится с ответом и склоняет голову.{/n} "Я и весь мой род станем с удвоенным рвением служить Человечеству, неукоснительно следуя Имперскому Кредо".
"Utterly certain," {n}answers the enforcer at once, bowing his head.{/n} "I and all my line will serve Humanity with redoubled zeal, observing the Imperial Creed with impeccable rigour."
languages.original_text: "Отнюдь". {n}Блюститель сразу находится с ответом и склоняет голову.{/n} "Я и весь мой род станем с удвоенным рвением служить Человечеству, неукоснительно следуя Имперскому Кредо".

traits.locale_text: "Utterly certain," {n}answers the warden at once, bowing his head.{/n} "I and all my line will serve Humanity with redoubled zeal, observing the Imperial Creed with impeccable rigour."

"Utterly certain," {n}answers the warden at once, bowing his head.{/n} "I and all my line will serve Humanity with redoubled zeal, observing the Imperial Creed with impeccable rigour."

languages.text: «Absolutamente». {n}El guardia responde al instante con una inclinación de cabeza.{/n} «Tanto yo como mi linaje serviremos a la Humanidad con un fervor renovado y seguiremos el Credo imperial con un rigor impecable».
languages.original_text: "Utterly certain," {n}answers the enforcer at once, bowing his head.{/n} "I and all my line will serve Humanity with redoubled zeal, observing the Imperial Creed with impeccable rigour."

traits.locale_text: «Absolutamente». {n}El guardia responde al instante con una inclinación de cabeza.{/n} «Tanto yo como mi linaje serviremos a la Humanidad con un fervor renovado y seguiremos el Credo imperial con un rigor impecable».

languages.text: “万分确定，”{n}执法者立刻低下头答道。{/n}“我和我整个家族都将以加倍热忱效忠人类，以无懈可击的严谨恪守帝国信仰。”
languages.original_text: "Utterly certain," {n}answers the enforcer at once, bowing his head.{/n} "I and all my line will serve Humanity with redoubled zeal, observing the Imperial Creed with impeccable rigour."

traits.locale_text: “万分确定，”{n}执法者立刻低下头答道。{/n}“我和我整个家族都将以加倍热忱效忠人类，以无懈可击的严谨恪守帝国信仰。”

languages.text: « Sûr et certain, {n}répond le prévôt du tac au tac avec un hochement de tête.{/n} Ma lignée et moi-même servirons l'humanité avec un zèle redoublé, et nous respecterons le Credo Impérial à la lettre. »
languages.original_text: "Utterly certain," {n}answers the enforcer at once, bowing his head.{/n} "I and all my line will serve Humanity with redoubled zeal, observing the Imperial Creed with impeccable rigour."

traits.locale_text: « Sûr et certain, {n}répond le prévôt du tac au tac avec un hochement de tête.{/n} Ma lignée et moi-même servirons l'humanité avec un zèle redoublé, et nous respecterons le Credo Impérial à la lettre. »

languages.text: "Kesinlikle eminim." {n}İnfazcı hızla yanıtlayıp başını eğiyor.{/n} "Ben ve tüm soyum, İmparatorluk İtikadı'nı kusursuz bir titizlikle gözeterek İnsanlığa iki kat gayretle hizmet edeceğiz."
languages.original_text: "Utterly certain," {n}answers the enforcer at once, bowing his head.{/n} "I and all my line will serve Humanity with redoubled zeal, observing the Imperial Creed with impeccable rigour."

traits.locale_text: "Kesinlikle eminim." {n}İnfazcı hızla yanıtlayıp başını eğiyor.{/n} "Ben ve tüm soyum, İmparatorluk İtikadı'nı kusursuz bir titizlikle gözeterek İnsanlığa iki kat gayretle hizmet edeceğiz."

languages.text: "Absolut sicher", {n}antwortet der Enforcer sofort und senkt seinen Kopf.{/n} "Meine gesamte Linie wird der Menschheit mit doppeltem Eifer dienen und mit unfehlbarer Strenge über den Imperialen Glauben wachen."
languages.original_text: "Utterly certain," {n}answers the enforcer at once, bowing his head.{/n} "I and all my line will serve Humanity with redoubled zeal, observing the Imperial Creed with impeccable rigour."

traits.locale_text: "Absolut sicher", {n}antwortet der Enforcer sofort und senkt seinen Kopf.{/n} "Meine gesamte Linie wird der Menschheit mit doppeltem Eifer dienen und mit unfehlbarer Strenge über den Imperialen Glauben wachen."

languages.text: 「絶対に」{n}、執行官は頭を下げて答えた。{/n}「私は、そして私の血筋は、人類のために、さらに熱意をもって奉仕し、帝国の教義を厳格に守ります」
languages.original_text: "Utterly certain," {n}answers the enforcer at once, bowing his head.{/n} "I and all my line will serve Humanity with redoubled zeal, observing the Imperial Creed with impeccable rigour."
